lines.target: A man is trying to entertain his guest in a club.
lines.base: Un hombre intenta distraer a su invitado en un club.
lines.pronunciation: .. entétein... guest... — 6 ... biliárds — 8 ... ches? — 11 ... pristum ? — 12 ... rentit...

lines.target: Would you like a Scotch? — No thank you.
I tried it once and didn't like it. I never tried it again.
lines.base: Lo probé una vez y no me gustó. No lo probé más.

lines.target: Well, have some beer. — No, thank you.
lines.base: Bien, tome una cerveza. — No gracias.

lines.target: I tried some once and didn't like it. I never drank it again.
lines.base: La probé una vez y no me gustó. Nunca más la bebí.

lines.target: How about a game of billiards? — No thank you.
I played it once and didn't like it. I never tried it again.
lines.base: Jugué una vez y no me gustó. Nunca lo intenté de nuevo.

lines.target: Well, a game of chess? — Again, no thank you.
I played it once and didn't like it.
lines.base: Jugué una vez y no me gustó.

lines.target: But here is my son. He's an excellent player.
lines.base: Pero aquí está mi hijo. Es un excelente jugador.

lines.target: What did you do in America? — We rented a car and visited the West Coast.
lines.base: ¿Qué hicisteis en América? — Alquilamos un coche y visitamos la costa oeste.

lines.target: Did you see the Grand Canyon? — No, we didn't have time.
lines.base: ¿Visteis el Gran Cañon ? — No, no tuvimos tiempo.
